DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY AND FOR SANCTIONS, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE MATTER IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 8, 2017 AT 9:00 A.M. IN DEPT. 302, DISCOVERY, TO GIVE DEFENDANT THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.7B. DEFENDANT MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE EXHIBITS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN AUGUST 31, 2017 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Aug-14-2019 Discharged

Motice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-08-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance, The Court adopted it's tentative ruling; ASSIGNEE COLLECTRONICS, INC. Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions IS UNOPPOSED AND GRANTED. Prevailing party to prepare Order. Judge: Aaron Minnis; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany; Reporter: Not reported (HK/JPT/302).

Motice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-31-2017 Continued To Sep-08-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendant's Motion to Compel Answers to Post-Judgment Discovery and for Sanctions is continued to September 8, 2017 to give Defendant the opportunity to comply with Local rule 2.7B. Defendant must deliver courtesy copies of the Exhibits to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than August 31, 2017 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Judge Pro Tem: Dianne Peebles, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING FURTHER RESPONSES
Off Calendar Jul-05-2000 Granted Per Written Order
